EF0 TORNADO NEAR WILLIAMS DRIVE JUST SOUTH OF BIRCH LAKE. PATH LENGTH OF 0.10 MILES, PATH WIDTH 55 YARDS AND MAXIMUM WIND SPEED OF 80 MPH. DAMAGE TO A FEW HOUSES AND OUTBUILDINGS ALONG AND NEAR WILLIAMS DRIVE, PRIMARILY DUE TO FALLING TREES. MANY TREES ALSO UPROOTED IN THE AREA, LIKELY CAUSED BY VERY WET GROUND FROM RECENT HEAVY RAINS.
